ddls:
CREATE TABLE "house_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each house plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the house plan */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the house plan */,
  "architectural_style" TEXT /* Architectural style of the house plan */,
  "number_of_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the house plan */,
  "number_of_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the house plan */,
  "garage_type" TEXT /* Type of garage (e.g., attached, detached, none) */,
  "lot_size" INTEGER /* Size of the lot in square feet */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status (e.g., available, sold, under construction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., interior, exterior, landscaping) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost to the developer for including the feature */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature is standard or an upgrade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing entry */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the house plan */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the feature for the specific house plan */,
  "is_discounted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature is currently discounted */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage discount if applicable */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the pricing is effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_pricing_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_pricing_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES house_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the house plan sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the house plan */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the sale */,
  "number_of_units" INTEGER /* Number of units sold in this sale */,
  "down_payment" TEXT /* Down payment amount */,
  "financing_type" TEXT /* Type of financing (e.g., mortgage, cash) */,
  "expected_completion_date" TEXT /* Expected date of completion for the sale */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual date of completion for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES house_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Preferences or notes about the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status (e.g., single, married) */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children in the household */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the customer */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of the referral (e.g., marketing campaign, real estate agent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign (e.g., first-time buyers, families) */,
  "campaign_medium" TEXT /* Medium used for the campaign (e.g., email, social media, print) */,
  "expected_reach" INTEGER /* Expected number of people to be reached by the campaign */,
  "actual_reach" INTEGER /* Actual number of people reached by the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign that generated the lead */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who is a lead */,
  "lead_date" TEXT /* Date the lead was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the lead (e.g., new, contacted, converted) */,
  "lead_source" TEXT /* Source of the lead (e.g., campaign, referral) */,
  "lead_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the lead (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the next follow-up with the lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_leads_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_leads_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the sale */,
  "profit" TEXT /* Profit from the sale */,
  "number_of_units" INTEGER /* Number of units sold in the performance entry */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* Average price per unit */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* Conversion rate of leads to sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
